zh.lifeSummary: 當Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"於1383年11月13日出生在德國貝也藍書特藍書特時，她的父親Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach44歲，母親Maddalena Visconti22歲。她於1401年9月18日與Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg在德國貝也奧培爾巴也爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和9個女兒的父母。她去世於1442年11月13日在德國貝也安斯巴赫安斯巴赫享年59歲，埋葬在德國貝也。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"于1383年11月13日出生在德国貝也藍書特藍書特时，她的父亲Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach44岁，母亲Maddalena Visconti22岁。她于1401年9月18日与Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg在德国貝也奧培爾巴也爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和9个女儿的父母。她去世于1442年11月13日在德国貝也安斯巴赫安斯巴赫享年59岁，埋葬在德国貝也。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Bavaria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Collette, Marcel, Normand, Raoul.

nameMeanings.name: Elisabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

variants.name: Elizabeth
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" was born on 13 November 1383, in Landshut, Landshut, Bavaria, Germany, her father, Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach, was 44 and her mother, Maddalena Visconti, was 22. She married Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg on 18 September 1401, in Oberbayern, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 9 daughters. She died on 13 November 1442, in Ansbach, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 59, and was buried in Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" est née le 13 novembre 1383, à Landshut, Landshut, Bayern, Allemagne, son père, Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Maddalena Visconti, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg le 18 septembre 1401, à Oberbayern, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 9 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 novembre 1442, à Ansbach, Ansbach, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Bayern, Allemagne.

de.Burghausen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany: Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" am 13. November 1383 in Landshut, Landshut, Bayern, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach 44 und ihre Mutter Maddalena Visconti 22. Sie hat am 18. September 1401 in Oberbayern, Bayern, Deutschland Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 9 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. November 1442 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Ansbach, Ansbach, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" è nata il il 13 novembre 1383 nel Landshut, Landshut, Bayern, Germania, sua padre, Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Maddalena Visconti, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg il 18 settembre 1401, nel Oberbayern, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 9 figlie. Morì il 13 novembre 1442, nel Ansbach, Ansbach, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Bayern, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"が1383年11月13日にドイツバイエルンランドシュトランドシュトで生まれた時，父Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbachは44歳，母Maddalena Viscontiは22歳であった。1401年9月18日にドイツバイエルンオバーバイエルンでMarkgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1442年11月13日にドイツバイエルンアンスバチアンスバチで59歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg"(이)가 1383년 11월 13일 독일 베이른 랜드슈트 랜드슈트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maddalena Visconti(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1401년 9월 18일 독일 베이른 오버베이른에서 Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1442년 11월 13일 독일 베이른 앤스바치 앤스바치에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" nasceu em 13 de novembro de 1383, em Landshut, Landshut, Bayern, Alemanha, seu pai, Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Maddalena Visconti, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg em 18 de setembro de 1401, em Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 9 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de novembro de 1442, em Ansbach, Ansbach, Bayern, Alemanha, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.Burghausen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany: бургаусен, винделсбач, ландкрис ансбач, беиирн, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" родилась 13 ноября 1383 г. в местности ландшут, ландшут, беиирн, Германия, её отцу по имени Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Maddalena Visconti, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg 18 сентября 1401 г. в местности обирбеиирн, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 9 дочерей. Она умерла 13 ноября 1442 г. в местности ансбач, ансбач, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности беиирн, Германия.

es.Burghausen, Ansbach, Bavaria, Germany: Burghausen, Windelsbach, Landkreis Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elisabeth Wittelsbach of Bavaria "Electress of Brandenburg" nació el 13 de noviembre de 1383, en Landshut, Landshut, Bayern, Alemania, su papá, Frederick, Duke of Bavaria House of Wittelsbach, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Maddalena Visconti, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Markgraf Friedrich I. von Brandenburg , Burggraf von Nürnberg el 18 de septiembre de 1401, en Oberbayern, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 9 hijas. Murió el 13 de noviembre de 1442, en Ansbach, Ansbach, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Bayern, Alemania.
